subject: DevOps
title: Infrastructure Security Scanning
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Infrastructure Security Scanning.

hook.text: Terraform opened port 22 to the world. Checkov caught it in the PR, before it reached production.

buildup.text: Infrastructure as Code can have misconfigs just like app code. Security scanning must cover IaC too.

discovery.text: Checkov, tfsec, and Snyk IaC scan Terraform, CloudFormation, and K8s manifests for security issues.

twist.text: IaC scanning finds problems before resources exist. Fix a file, not a live misconfiguration.

climax.text: CSPM tools continuously scan live infrastructure and catch drift from secure configurations.

punchline.text: Scan IaC before deploy. Scan live infra continuously. Cover both.

quiz.question: What do IaC scanning tools like Checkov and tfsec check?
options: Infrastructure code for security misconfigurations before deployment
